channel.title: Kolkata Cab Service — Travel Blog
channel.description: Travel guides, route tips, fare charts, and cab booking guides from Kolkata Cab Service. Expert advice for cab travel in Kolkata, Ranchi, Jamshedpur, and 80+ cities across East India.

item.title: Complete Guide to Cab Service in Kolkata 2026
item.description: Everything you need to know about booking a cab in Kolkata — pricing, routes, vehicle options, airport transfers, and tips for the best experience.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata to Darjeeling by Cab — Complete Road Trip Guide 2026
item.description: Plan your Kolkata to Darjeeling cab trip with this detailed guide covering route, fare, best time, places to visit, and booking tips.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata Airport Cab Service — CCU Pickup & Drop Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide to Kolkata airport cab service at Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose International Airport. Pricing, booking, and tips.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: 10 Best Weekend Trips from Kolkata by Cab — 2026 Guide
item.description: Discover the best weekend getaways from Kolkata by car. Digha, Mandarmani, Shantiniketan, Sundarbans, and more with cab fare details.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata to Puri Cab — Jagannath Temple Trip Guide 2026
item.description: Plan your Kolkata to Puri cab trip. Complete guide with route, fare, Jagannath temple visit tips, Konark temple, and booking details.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata Wedding Car Rental — Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Book decorated wedding cars in Kolkata. Innova Crysta, Fortuner, luxury sedan with flower decoration for baraat and vidaai.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata to Digha Cab — Beach Road Trip Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide for Kolkata to Digha cab trip. Route details, fare, best beaches, hotels, and booking information.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata Corporate Car Rental — Employee Transport & Business Travel
item.description: Professional corporate car rental services in Kolkata. Monthly contracts, GST invoices, employee transport, client meetings.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata to Siliguri Cab — NH12 Travel Guide 2026
item.description: Book Kolkata to Siliguri cab. Route guide via NH12, fare chart, travel tips, and gateway to Darjeeling, Gangtok, and North Bengal.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)

item.title: Kolkata Local Taxi Fare Chart 2026 — Complete Pricing Guide
item.description: Detailed fare chart for local taxi service in Kolkata. Hourly packages, per km rates, and area-wise pricing for all vehicle types.
item.author: kolkatacabtaxiservices@gmail.com (Kolkata Cab Service)
